code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Өгөгдсөн домэйн дотор байгаа эсэхийг шалгахын тулд өгөгдсөн чиглүүлэх URL-г шалгана уу.
Хэрэв тийм бол чиглүүлэхэд зориулсан URL-г буцаана; үгүй бол чиглүүлэхэд зориулсан домэйн URL-г ашиглана.
https протоколыг ашиглана уу.

Жишээнүүд:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Чиглүүлэх URL мөр.
@param domain: Протоколгүй домэйн мөр.

@return Чиглүүлэх URL мөр.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Checks if a given redirect URL is within a given domain.
If it is, returns the URL for redirect; otherwise, uses the domain's URL for redirect.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The redirect URL string.
@param domain: The domain string without protocol.

@return The redirect URL string.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: Шэл командаа гүйцэтгэж, түүний гаралтыг авах функц; санах ойг чөлөөлөх үүрэг дуудагчдад хамаарна; энэ функцийг дараа нь өгөгдсөн тул хэрэгжүүлэх шаардлагагүй (гэхдээ энд зарлаж, ашиглах боломжтой болгох).

Хувийн DSA түлхүүр үүсгэж, PEM форматаар экспортлож, түүнийг мөрөөр буцаана.
Зөвлөмж: DSA параметр файл болон DSA хувийн түлхүүрийг үүсгэхийн тулд дараах шэл командуудыг гүйцэтгэнэ:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <параметрийг хадгалах түр файл> <түлхүүрийн урт>`
2. `openssl gendsa <параметрийг хадгалах түр файл>`
DSA параметр файлын өвөрмөц түр файлын нэрийг үүсгэхийн тулд `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ашиглаж болно.

@return Үүсгэсэн DSA хувийн түлхүүрийг PEM форматаар буцаана, эсвэл алдаа гарвал NULL буцаана.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A function that executes a shell command and captures its output; the caller is responsible for freeing memory; this function is provided later, so it does not need to be implemented (but declared here to make it available for use).

Generates a private DSA key, exports it in PEM format, and returns it as a string.
Hint: To generate a DSA parameter file and a DSA private key, execute the following shell commands:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file for parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file for parameters>`
To create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.

@return Returns the generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurs.

DSA параметр файлын өвөрмөц түр файлын нэрийг үүсгэхийн тулд `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ашиглаж болно.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
bool searchPattern(const std::string& pattern, const std::string& content) {

prompt_en:
/**
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
prompt_1:
/* XML мэдээллийг задлан шинжилж, өгөгдсөн хэрэглэгчийн нэр, нууц үгийн дагуу оюутны мэдээллийг буцаана. XML мэдээлэл дараах бүтэцтэй байх болно:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
